config.name: akamai_cdn-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: akamai_cdn-latest 
-- OCSF Class: HTTP Activity (4002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:12:59.392691

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local PATTERNS = {
    ip = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$",
    status = "^%d%d%d$"
}

-- Local helper functions for performance
local function validate_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return false end
    return string.match(ip, PATTERNS.ip) ~= nil
end

local function validate_status(code)
    if not code then return false end 
    return string.match(code, PATTERNS.status) ~= nil
end

local function safe_number(val)
    if not val then return nil end
    local num = tonumber(val)
    return num
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local table
    local output = {
        -- Core OCSF fields
        class_uid = 4002,
        class_name = "HTTP Activity", 
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        type_uid = 400201,
        activity_id = 1,
        activity_name = "HTTP Request",
        severity_id = 1,
        status_id = 1,

        -- Initialize nested structures
        src_endpoint = {},
        dst_endpoint = {},
        http_request = {},
        http_response = {},
        metadata = {},
        enrichments = {},
        observables = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    if record.timestamp then
        output.time = record.timestamp
    else
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    -- IP address handling with validation
    if validate_ip(record.client_ip) then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = record.client_ip
    end
    
    if validate_ip(record.edge_ip) then
        output.dst_endpoint.ip = record.edge_ip
    end

    -- HTTP request fields
    if record.host then 
        output.http_request.hostname = record.host
    end
    
    if record.method then
        output.http_request.http_method = record.method
    end
    
    if record.path then
        output.http_request.url = {
            path = record.path
        }
    end

    -- HTTP response fields
    if validate_status(record.status_code) then
        local code = safe_number(record.status_code)
        output.http_response.code = code
        -- Set status_id based on response code
        if code >= 200 and code < 300 then
            output.status_id = 1
        elseif code >= 400 then
            output.status_id = 2
        end
    end

    if record.bytes then
        output.http_response.length = safe_number(record.bytes)
    end

    -- Performance metrics
    if record.response_time_ms then
        output.response_time = safe_number(record.response_time_ms)
    end

    -- Enrichments
    if record.cache_status then
        output.enrichments.cache_status = record.cache_status
    end

    -- Location data
    if record.country then
        output.src_endpoint.location = output.src_endpoint.location or {}
        output.src_endpoint.location.country = record.country
    end
    
    if record.city then
        output.src_endpoint.location = output.src_endpoint.location or {}
        output.src_endpoint.location.city = record.city
    end

    -- Metadata
    if record.request_id then
        output.metadata.correlation_uid = record.request_id
    end
    
    if record.stream_id then
        output.metadata.log_name = record.stream_id
    end

    -- Generate observables
    if record.client_ip and record.host then
        output.observables = {
            {
                name = "src_ip",
                type = "IP Address", 
                value = record.client_ip
            },
            {
                name = "hostname",
                type = "Hostname",
                value = record.host
            }
        }
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end
